publicStories.name: Billy J.
publicStories.body:
Fox Road, Rosebank has deteriorated into an unsafe and unacceptable condition.

Severe potholes now cover large sections of the road, forcing drivers to swerve into oncoming lanes to avoid damage. In places, the road edge has eroded away, with sharp drop-offs into bushland. Together, these hazards significantly increase the risk of collisions or vehicles being forced off the road.

This is no longer a minor maintenance issue — it is a clear and escalating safety risk for residents, families, school traffic, and service providers. The condition of the road is also impacting access to homes and local businesses, with deliveries and clients increasingly unwilling to travel along Fox Road.

Despite ongoing rates being paid, maintenance has not kept pace with deterioration. Temporary repairs are not lasting, and long gaps between works are making the situation worse.

We are calling on Lismore City Council to:

* Undertake urgent repairs to restore the road to a safe condition
* Provide a clear and transparent timeline for works
* Commit to a long-term solution, including sealing the road to prevent ongoing degradation

This is a basic safety and access issue. Without timely action, the risk to the community will continue to grow.

publicStories.name: Betty J.
publicStories.body: Every day I nearly have a collision with a car that is swerving to avoid the extensive potholes. Our cars have bottomed out so many times this past couple of months, about 5 flat tyres this year, tyre repairs and replacements. It honestly couldn’t get any worse.

publicStories.name: Jason B.
publicStories.body:
Several near misses 
Damage to vehicle 
Daily anxiety re access to our property

publicStories.name: Alicia H.
publicStories.body: Constant vehicle repairs which mechanic says are from the road condition. Almost daily near misses with other cars trying to avoid big or clusters of potholes

publicStories.name: Eric H.
publicStories.body: Riding motorcycle very dangerous with potholes and cars driving on the wrong side of the road. Have had to resort to patching potholes ourselves for to poor road maintenance. Guests have had numerous damages to vehicles.

publicStories.name: Thea D.
publicStories.body:
I have had 3 flat tires last year & had to pay $1000 to a mechanic to fix radial arms, steering & suspension. 
If I needed to be transported by an ambulance,  I would definitely fear the ride on the road, as it would be super bumpy & all over the road.
The community continues to purchase gravel to fill potholes & fix the road.
It's so dangerous navigating around the potholes, I feel like I may slip in the mud & swerve off the road or worse, into another car.

publicStories.name: Elise H.
publicStories.body: It damages my car as it grates the bottom every day I use it. Also getting unsafe, risk falling down high ravine while escaping the potholes, in two locations,

publicStories.name: Vanessa W.
publicStories.body: Sooo dangerous. Liability on my car, scary at times.

publicStories.name: Brett W.
publicStories.body:
Impact on daily life and several near misses, particularly when the road is wet and slippery and when the school bus is on the road. 

The community has also funded a delivery of our own road material and fix the worst potholes in between council grading.

publicStories.name: Ryan D.
publicStories.body:
My wife and i have had several near misses when  meeting cars on the road, its an accident waiting to happen. Fix it before someone gets hurt.
Recently replaced suspension on both our cars and now concerned about the cost of yet more repairs due to the road wrecking our cars.

publicStories.name: julien P.
publicStories.body: Every day driving  over the large potholes has caused damage to my vehicles and trailers and is an accident waiting to happen
